package rulecoverage

func PositiveBytesSplitafternTwoIndexOneCut() string {
    ruleID := "bytes_splitaftern_two_index_one_cut"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`bytes.SplitAfterN(..., 2)[1]` instead of a two-part `bytes.Cut(...)` flow."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
